ops.text: Phase 3 roster is now GitHub-authoritative via fleetlib repos_with_file(layout): 38 wired repos + the 4 hand-authored PACKBLOCK repos (cc-context/cc-guides/cc-notes/cc-present, handled in Phase 2) = 42 configs total. Corrections vs local scan: write-like-me and yasyf.com HAVE layouts remotely (local clones stale — their earlier "no-config-today" classification was a stale-clone artifact; their activation deltas stand anyway since all config dies); synonym-to-clicky-for-things-that-that-need-to-be-done is wired but not cloned locally; local dirs cookie-sync/repo-sync/daily/claude-pool are stale duplicates of renamed repos cookiesync/reposync/dailies/cc-pool. Phase 3 sweep protocol: iterate the 38 GitHub names, resolve local clone by origin URL (clone if absent), pull fresh, then apply the retirement procedure. cc-skills is both a consumer (layout dies in sweep) and the fragment host (fragments die LAST after a zero-reference re-probe).
